mission.name: leo_orbit_environment_disturbed_rigid_body
mission.description: CubeSat attitude dynamics with Kepler orbit, IGRF magnetic field, eclipse, RMM, gravity-gradient, and SRP disturbance torques

conventions.q_BI: attitude quaternion mapping inertial frame I to body frame B
conventions.C_BI: direction cosine matrix mapping v_I to v_B
conventions.omega_BI_B: angular velocity of body B wrt inertial I, expressed in body frame B
